text_matches_any: This publication is available free of charge
waivers.scope_note: Signed reason names 'extraction blocks 4-5' (plural): the whole rotated DOI watermark run. The single text_contains matched only its first fragment, because the extractor splits the rotated run across blocks. Re-expressed as a content predicate over the whole run. Scope unchanged from what was signed.
